sequence.speaker: Walsh
text: Well well well, look who made it back in one piece!
Walsh slapped Abel on the back hard enough to make him stumble.

sequence.speaker: Walsh
text: Not bad fer yer first run. Not bad at all. Ye didn't capsize, ye didn't lose the net, and ye brought back somethin' worth eatin'.

sequence.speaker: Abel
text: Thanks. Honestly, it felt... good? Like I actually did something today.

sequence.speaker: Walsh
text: That's what honest work does to a man! None of that... whatever it is you youngsters do on computers.

sequence.speaker: Abel
text: Yeah, well. Computers are kind of how I ended up here.

sequence.speaker: Walsh
text: And here is where ye are! No use lookin' backward. Only forward, toward the horizon.

sequence.speaker: Walsh
text: Now listen, tomorrow we push a bit further out. The lagoon was just a warm-up. The bay's where the real fish are.

sequence.speaker: Walsh
text: But fer tonight? Go see Brad up at the bar. Tell 'im I sent ye. He'll sort you out. Once you've recharged, you can have your first day by yourself on the water.
